nasb.text: shall be the gates of the city, named for the tribes of Israel, three gates toward the north: the gate of Reuben, one; the gate of Judah, one; the gate of Levi, one.

esv.text: three gates, the gate of Reuben, the gate of Judah, and the gate of Levi, the gates of the city being named after the tribes of Israel.

cnv.text: 城門要按以色列各支派取名。北面有三個門口，一個是流本門，一個是猶大門，一個是利未門。

ccb.text: 城门都按以色列的各支派命名。城北面的三道门分别是吕便门、犹大门和利未门。
